logger.doc:name: Log Control Visits Request
logger.message: #['PAY-001 Snowflake System API | GET /control/visits | correlationId=' ++ vars.correlationId]

snowflake:select.doc:name: Select Visits Control Row
snowflake:select.snowflake:sql: SELECT SOURCE_NAME, ENDPOINT, DELTA_KEY, DELTA_VALUE, LAST_RUN_ID, LAST_RUN_STATUS, LAST_RUN_ROWS, LAST_RUN_TIME_UTC FROM DEV_INTEGRATION.SANDWAI.API_CONTROL WHERE SOURCE_NAME = 'SANDWAI' AND ENDPOINT = 'visits' AND DELTA_KEY = 'lastupdated'

ee:transform.doc:name: Build Control Row Not Found Response

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- { status: { code: "ERROR", httpStatus: 404, message: "Visits control row not found in Snowflake" }, meta: { correlationId: vars.correlationId, interfaceId: vars.interfaceId, runId: null, businessContext: "Read-only control status query for PAY-001 visits endpoint", dateTimeStamp: now(), originatingSystem: "MuleSoft", targetSystem: "Snowflake", requestingAPI: "pay001-snowflake-sys-api/GET /control/visits", responseAPIorSystem: "Snowflake", muleEnvironment: vars.muleEnvironment }, error: { errorId: "ERR-PAY001-" ++ ((now() as String {format: "yyyyMMddHHmmss"})) ++ "-CONTROL-NOT-FOUND", interfaceId: vars.interfaceId, errorType: "SOURCE_SYSTEM_FAULT", errorCode: "PAY001-SNOWFLAKE-CONTROL-404", errorMessage: "No control table row exists for SOURCE_NAME=SANDWAI, ENDPOINT=visits, DELTA_KEY=lastupdated", failureStage: "SOURCE_QUERY", retryable: false, muleApplication: "pay001-snowflake-sys-api", flowName: "get-control-visits-flow", sourceSystem: "Snowflake", targetSystem: "MuleSoft", businessContext: "sourceName=SANDWAI;endpoint=visits;deltaKey=lastupdated", additionalDetails: "Seed the PAYROLL_CONTROL table before enabling the PAY-001 Process API." } }

%dw 2.0 output application/json var row = vars.controlRows[0] --- { status: { code: "SUCCESS", httpStatus: 200, message: "Visits control row retrieved successfully from Snowflake" }, meta: { correlationId: vars.correlationId, interfaceId: vars.interfaceId, runId: row.LAST_RUN_ID default null, businessContext: "Read-only control status query for PAY-001 visits endpoint", dateTimeStamp: now(), originatingSystem: "MuleSoft", targetSystem: "Snowflake", requestingAPI: "pay001-snowflake-sys-api/GET /control/visits", responseAPIorSystem: "Snowflake", muleEnvironment: vars.muleEnvironment }, data: { sourceName: row.SOURCE_NAME, endpoint: row.ENDPOINT, deltaKey: row.DELTA_KEY, deltaValue: row.DELTA_VALUE, lastRunId: row.LAST_RUN_ID default null, lastRunStatus: row.LAST_RUN_STATUS, isPending: upper((row.LAST_RUN_STATUS default "") as String) == "PENDING", lastRunRows: row.LAST_RUN_ROWS default 0, lastRunTimeUtc: row.LAST_RUN_TIME_UTC default null } }

logger.doc:name: Log Control Visits Response
logger.message: #['PAY-001 Snowflake System API | GET /control/visits completed | correlationId=' ++ vars.correlationId ++ ' | httpStatus=' ++ (vars.httpStatus as String)]

logger.doc:name: Log Visits Request
logger.message: #['PAY-001 Snowflake System API | GET /visits | correlationId=' ++ vars.correlationId ++ ' | fromLastUpdated=' ++ ((vars.fromLastUpdated default '') as String) ++ ' | toLastUpdated=' ++ ((vars.toLastUpdated default '') as String) ++ ' | limit=' ++ ((vars.limit default '') as String )]

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- { status: { code: "VALIDATION_ERROR", httpStatus: 400, message: "(fromLastUpdated and toLastUpdated) or (actualStart or actualEnd) query parameters are required" }, meta: { correlationId: vars.correlationId, interfaceId: vars.interfaceId, runId: null, businessContext: "Read-only Snowflake visits query for PAY-001", dateTimeStamp: now(), originatingSystem: "MuleSoft", targetSystem: "Snowflake", requestingAPI: "pay001-snowflake-sys-api/GET /visits", responseAPIorSystem: "MuleSoft", muleEnvironment: vars.muleEnvironment }, error: { errorId: "ERR-PAY001-" ++ ((now() as String {format: "yyyyMMddHHmmss"})) ++ "-VALIDATION", interfaceId: vars.interfaceId, errorType: "DATA_VALIDATION", errorCode: "PAY001-SNOWFLAKE-400", errorMessage: "Required query parameters are missing", failureStage: "REQUEST_VALIDATION", retryable: false, muleApplication: "pay001-snowflake-sys-api", flowName: "get-visits-flow", sourceSystem: "MuleSoft", targetSystem: "Snowflake", businessContext: "fromLastUpdated=" ++ ((vars.fromLastUpdated default '') as String) ++ ";toLastUpdated=" ++ ((vars.toLastUpdated default '') as String), additionalDetails: "Both fromLastUpdated and toLastUpdated must be provided in RFC3339 format.", validationErrors: [ { field: "fromLastUpdated", value: (vars.fromLastUpdated default "") as String, rule: "MANDATORY_FIELD", message: "fromLastUpdated is required" }, { field: "toLastUpdated", value: (vars.toLastUpdated default "") as String, rule: "MANDATORY_FIELD", message: "toLastUpdated is required" } ] } }

when.expression: #[(not isBlank(vars.fromLastUpdated) and not isBlank(vars.toLastUpdated)) and (isBlank(vars.actualStart) and isBlank(vars.actualEnd))]

snowflake:select.doc:name: Select Visits
snowflake:select.snowflake:sql: SELECT SCHEDULE_ID ACCEPT_DATE, ACTUAL_END, ACTUAL_START, CANCEL_REASON, CLIENT_RELATED_TRAVEL, EMPLOYEE_CUSTOM_ID, EMPLOYEE_FIRST_NAME, EMPLOYEE_ID, EMPLOYEE_LAST_NAME, EVENT_PAID_HOURS, EVENT_TYPE_CUSTOM_ID, LAST_UPDATED, RUN_ID, SCHEDULE_END, SCHEDULE_ID, SCHEDULE_START, SERVICE_NAME, STATUS, TRAVEL_DISTANCE, TRAVEL_DURATION FROM DEV_INTEGRATION.SANDWAI.VISITS -- or FROM VISITS QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( PARTITION BY SCHEDULE_ID ORDER BY LAST_UPDATED DESC NULLS LAST ) = 1 AND LAST_UPDATED > TRY_TO_TIMESTAMP_NTZ(:fromLastUpdated) AND LAST_UPDATED <= TRY_TO_TIMESTAMP_NTZ(:toLastUpdated)

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json var rows = vars.visitsRows default [] --- { status: { code: "SUCCESS", httpStatus: 200, message: "Visits retrieved successfully from Snowflake" }, meta: { correlationId: vars.correlationId, interfaceId: vars.interfaceId, runId: null, businessContext: "Read-only Snowflake visits query for PAY-001", dateTimeStamp: now(), originatingSystem: "MuleSoft", targetSystem: "Snowflake", requestingAPI: "pay001-snowflake-sys-api/GET /visits", responseAPIorSystem: "Snowflake", muleEnvironment: vars.muleEnvironment }, data: { query: { fromLastUpdated: vars.fromLastUpdated, toLastUpdated: vars.toLastUpdated, limit: vars.limit }, rowCount: sizeOf(rows), visits: rows map ((row) -> { acceptDate: row.ACCEPT_DATE default null, actualEnd: row.ACTUAL_END default null, actualStart: row.ACTUAL_START default null, cancelReason: row.CANCEL_REASON default null, clientRelatedTravel: row.CLIENT_RELATED_TRAVEL default null, employeeCustomId: row.EMPLOYEE_CUSTOM_ID, employeeFirstName: row.EMPLOYEE_FIRST_NAME, employeeId: row.EMPLOYEE_ID, employeeLastName: row.EMPLOYEE_LAST_NAME, eventPaidHours: row.EVENT_PAID_HOURS default null, eventTypeCustomId: row.EVENT_TYPE_CUSTOM_ID, lastUpdated: row.LAST_UPDATED, sourceRunId: row.RUN_ID, scheduleEnd: row.SCHEDULE_END default null, scheduleId: row.SCHEDULE_ID, scheduleStart: row.SCHEDULE_START default null, serviceName: row.SERVICE_NAME default null, status: row.STATUS, travelDistance: row.TRAVEL_DISTANCE default null, travelDuration: row.TRAVEL_DURATION default null }) } }

snowflake:select.doc:name: Select Visits
snowflake:select.snowflake:sql: SELECT SCHEDULE_ID ACCEPT_DATE, ACTUAL_END, ACTUAL_START, CANCEL_REASON, CLIENT_RELATED_TRAVEL, EMPLOYEE_CUSTOM_ID, EMPLOYEE_FIRST_NAME, EMPLOYEE_ID, EMPLOYEE_LAST_NAME, EVENT_PAID_HOURS, EVENT_TYPE_CUSTOM_ID, LAST_UPDATED, RUN_ID, SCHEDULE_END, SCHEDULE_ID, SCHEDULE_START, SERVICE_NAME, STATUS, TRAVEL_DISTANCE, TRAVEL_DURATION FROM DEV_INTEGRATION.SANDWAI.VISITS -- or FROM VISITS QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( PARTITION BY SCHEDULE_ID ORDER BY LAST_UPDATED DESC NULLS LAST ) = 1 AND ACTUAL_START >= TRY_TO_TIMESTAMP_NTZ(:actualStart) AND ACTUAL_END <= TRY_TO_TIMESTAMP_NTZ(:actualEnd)

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json var rows = vars.visitsRows default [] --- { status: { code: "SUCCESS", httpStatus: 200, message: "Visits retrieved successfully from Snowflake" }, meta: { correlationId: vars.correlationId, interfaceId: vars.interfaceId, runId: null, businessContext: "Read-only Snowflake visits query for PAY-001", dateTimeStamp: now(), originatingSystem: "MuleSoft", targetSystem: "Snowflake", requestingAPI: "pay001-snowflake-sys-api/GET /visits", responseAPIorSystem: "Snowflake", muleEnvironment: vars.muleEnvironment }, data: { query: { fromLastUpdated: vars.fromLastUpdated, toLastUpdated: vars.toLastUpdated, limit: vars.limit }, rowCount: sizeOf(rows), visits: rows map ((row) -> { acceptDate: row.ACCEPT_DATE default null, actualEnd: row.ACTUAL_END default null, actualStart: row.ACTUAL_START default null, cancelReason: row.CANCEL_REASON default null, clientRelatedTravel: row.CLIENT_RELATED_TRAVEL default null, employeeCustomId: row.EMPLOYEE_CUSTOM_ID, employeeFirstName: row.EMPLOYEE_FIRST_NAME, employeeId: row.EMPLOYEE_ID, employeeLastName: row.EMPLOYEE_LAST_NAME, eventPaidHours: row.EVENT_PAID_HOURS default null, eventTypeCustomId: row.EVENT_TYPE_CUSTOM_ID, lastUpdated: row.LAST_UPDATED, sourceRunId: row.RUN_ID, scheduleEnd: row.SCHEDULE_END default null, scheduleId: row.SCHEDULE_ID, scheduleStart: row.SCHEDULE_START default null, serviceName: row.SERVICE_NAME default null, status: row.STATUS, travelDistance: row.TRAVEL_DISTANCE default null, travelDuration: row.TRAVEL_DURATION default null }) } }
